articles.title: CRYPTO TREASURY FEVER SPREADS TO ETHENA AS $360M SPAC DEAL TARGETS ENA ACCUMULATION
articles.summary: StablecoinX is set to merge with Nasdaq-listed shell TLGY Acquisition Corp under the ticker USDE, raising $360 million from the likes of Pantera, Dragonfly, Galaxy, and Polychain, including $100 million in discounted locked ENA and $260 million in cash. The plan is to amass Ethena's governance token and kickstart a $260 million ENA buyback by the Ethena Foundation. This SPAC-driven treasury play extends Wall Street's crypto balance-sheet strategies into DeFi altcoins, fueling a ~5% intraday ENA lift and a 65% weekly surge.

articles.title: POLYMARKET TO RETURN TO U.S. AFTER ACQUISITION
articles.summary: Polymarket is acquiring CFTC-licensed derivatives exchange QCX for $112 million, securing the regulatory approval needed to legally reopen its crypto prediction markets to US users. QCX's registration will enable Polymarket to offer fully compliant market contracts, expanding its popular events trading platform that boomed during the 2024 election. The deal comes after both the DOJ and CFTC closed investigations into Polymarket's prior US operations under a 2022 settlement. With this move, Polymarket aims to re-enter the US “in the near future,” challenging CFTC-regulated rivals like Kalshi and potentially shaking up sports betting.

articles.title: BAM: THE FUTURE OF BLOCK BUILDING ON SOLANA
articles.summary: BAM is a high-performance block-building architecture for Solana that layers a network of TEE-backed scheduler nodes, updated validators, and a plugin marketplace to enable private, verifiable, and programmable transaction sequencing. Transactions remain encrypted until execution inside secure enclaves, with cryptographic attestations published for public audit, while Plugins let developers implement custom ordering logic for use cases like CLOBs, perpetuals, and dark pools. This design curbs harmful MEV, unlocks application-controlled execution, and creates new revenue streams through Plugin fees, all without changing Solana's core protocol. A phased rollout by Jito Labs, followed by broad operator expansion and eventual open-source governance, will decentralize and scale BAM into Solana's institutional-grade block-building standard.

articles.title: COINBASE BRINGS PERPETUAL FUTURES TO THE U.S.
articles.summary: Coinbase has launched CFTC-regulated perpetual futures for U.S. traders, offering nano BTC and ETH contracts with up to 10x leverage and no monthly expirations. The product, available via Coinbase Financial Markets, marks the first time U.S. retail users can access perpetual-style crypto derivatives on a compliant platform. Contracts are long-dated (5 years), with low fees starting at 0.02%, enabling U.S. traders to tap into the most dominant trading tool in global crypto markets.

articles.title: THE STABLECOIN PLAYS THAT WILL RETIRE YOUR BLOODLINE
articles.summary: Policy, capital, sentiment, and participation are perfectly aligned for a stablecoin breakout. Ethereum is emerging as the backbone settlement layer, igniting pent-up demand for projects at this intersection. Contrarian opportunities include f(x) Protocol's fxUSD-driven leverage model, Frax's GENIUS-compliant frxUSD ecosystem and Fraxtal chain, and Curve/Convex's battle-tested liquidity infrastructure with its new crvUSD stablecoin. Each of these undervalued tokens is poised to capitalize on regulatory clarity and a liquidity-rich macro backdrop.

articles.title: 3 YEARS OF WEB3 MARKETING KNOWLEDGE IN ONE ARTICLE
articles.summary: Web3 marketing fundamentally differs from traditional marketing by operating as "narrative warfare," where controlling the story matters more than conventional funnels, with winners capturing the majority of liquidity through compelling personal narratives rather than polished campaigns. Founders must become the face and voice of their projects through consistent content creation, building trust and authority directly rather than relying on third parties. Success requires playing the long game by resisting premature launches or panic pivots during bear markets while carefully protecting reputation by avoiding short-term monetization tactics like unsolicited token shilling that erode credibility. In 2025's Web3 landscape, founders who overcome their discomfort with video content and personal branding will dominate, while those who remain invisible behind their projects will lose market share to less talented but more courageous competitors.

articles.title: $UNIT POTENTIAL GROWTH & VALUATION
articles.summary: Unit is rapidly becoming Hyperliquid's most dominant protocol, leading in TVL ($828M), volume ($4B), and protocol revenue. Based on current fee capture, Unit earns ~$12.8M in annualized revenue, with bullish scenarios projecting up to $340M as more Utokens launch and spot volumes grow. Valuations range from $766M to $10.8, depending on growth and trading volume assumptions, making $UNIT exposure potentially one of the most lucrative passive bets in crypto.

articles.title: FAVORITE FREE CRYPTO TOOLS
articles.summary: DeFiMinty shares a curated list of free tools for navigating crypto, from whale tracking and mindshare analysis to DeFi interactions and on-chain data. Top picks include Token Terminal for project metrics, DefiLlama for DeFi analytics, Rabby for wallet UX, and Dune for custom dashboards. Also highlighted are newer AI-native tools like Moby Agent, Kiyotaka, and Delphi Intelligence.

articles.title: ONE-SHOT CHECKOUT WITH BASE PAY
articles.summary: Sid Coelho-Prabhu built a full USDC checkout app in under 5 minutes using Cursor AI and Base Pay.

articles.title: LET INSTITUTIONS PAY TO BORROW YOUR ETH
articles.summary: Lending ETH on Aave is now yielding 13.42%.

articles.title: CIRCLE VS. WESTERN UNION: A VALUATION SIGNAL
articles.summary: Circle's $48B valuation dwarfs Western Union's $2.6B, despite Western Union moving 3x more annual volume.

articles.title: SHARPLINK BUYS $259M IN ETH, NOW HOLDS OVER 360K ETH
articles.summary: Sharplink acquired nearly 80,000 ETH for $259 million between July 14-20, bringing its total holdings to ~360,807 ETH, the largest weekly ETH purchase ever disclosed.
